summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Celebration QR Experience app. Backend APIs fully functional (11/11 tests passed). Frontend core functionality working well with event creation wizard, celebration experience, and dashboard. Minor issues with clipboard permissions and animated game elements.

ui_bugs.issue: Clipboard write permission denied when copying celebration links
ui_bugs.details: Browser security restriction - requires user gesture in secure context

ui_bugs.issue: Animated balloons are unstable for clicking due to movement
ui_bugs.details: Expected behavior for animated game elements - balloons float and move

integration_issues.issue: Theme selector reported 0 themes found but selection still worked
integration_issues.details: Themes are loading and selectable, but count detection may be off

passed_tests: Get all 12 themes with correct categories
Event CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete)
Landing page loads with hero section and CTA buttons
Event creation wizard - all 8 steps functional
Theme selector shows themes organized by category
Celebration experience page with preloader, countdown, curtain animations
Interactive cake with blow candles functionality
Section navigation (Home, Cake, Games, Gallery, Message)
Dashboard page shows events with action buttons
QR code modal generation and display
